product/src/main/java/com/yas/product/Pr.general_idea: Explicitly enable binding of ServiceUrlConfig properties in the Spring Boot application context.

product/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3 ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add Spring Boot OAuth2 Resource Server starter for securing APIs with JWT/OAuth2.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter for Bean Validation support.
Add Spring Boot WebFlux starter for reactive web support.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for generating OpenAPI documentation (updated for Spring Boot 3).
Add Spring Boot DevTools for faster development cycles.
Add Spring Boot Data JPA starter for database persistence.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Add H2 in-memory database for testing purposes.
Add Spring Boot AOP starter for aspect-oriented programming support.
Add Apache Commons Collections4 for utility collection classes.
Add Liquibase core for database schema migration management.
Add internal Saga framework dependency for distributed transaction management.
Add Logstash Logback Encoder for structured logging output.
Add OpenTelemetry Logback MDC instrumentation for observability.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to use Lombok annotation processor.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven target directory to gitignore to exclude build artifacts.
Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration directory to gitignore.
Add Eclipse project metadata files to gitignore.
Add VS Code configuration directory to gitignore.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Replace the placeholder 'test' ingress with a comprehensive API ingress for Swagger UI, Media, and Product services.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Changed host to api.yas.local and added paths for /swagger-ui, /media, and /product.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Add ingress rule for the storefront application.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added host 'storefront' routing to the storefront service on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Add ingress rule for the backoffice application.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added host 'backoffice' routing to the backoffice service on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Add ingress rule for the identity (Keycloak) application.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added host 'identity' routing to the identity service on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Add ingress rule for pgAdmin database management tool.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added host 'pgadmin.yas.local' routing to the pgadmin service on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Add ingress rule for Jaeger observability dashboard.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added host 'jaeger' routing to the jaeger service on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for the storefront application.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'storefront' selecting app: storefront on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for the backoffice application.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'backoffice' selecting app: backoffice on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for Swagger UI.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'swagger-ui' selecting app: swagger-ui on port 80 targeting 8080.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for the media service.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'media' selecting app: media on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for the product service.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'product' selecting app: product on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy the storefront BFF and frontend containers.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'storefront' with containers for yas-storefront-bff and yas-storefront.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy the backoffice BFF and frontend containers.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'backoffice' with containers for yas-backoffice-bff and yas-backoffice.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy Swagger UI container with API documentation URLs.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'swagger-ui' using swaggerapi/swagger-ui image with configured URLs.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy the media service container with database and observability config.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'media' with postgres datasource and OTLP exporter env vars.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy the product service container with database and observability config.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'product' with postgres datasource and OTLP exporter env vars.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Rename and update the Keycloak service to 'identity' and remove LoadBalancer type.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Changed service name to 'identity', removed type: LoadBalancer, kept port 80->8080.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Configure Keycloak deployment with PostgreSQL database environment variables.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added DB_VENDOR, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_ADDR, and DB_DATABASE env vars to keycloak container.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for PostgreSQL database.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'postgres' with NodePort 30007 on port 5432.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for pgAdmin.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'pgadmin' on port 80.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy PostgreSQL and pgAdmin containers with persistent storage.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'postgres' with postgres and pgadmin containers and volume mounts.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define Kubernetes Service for Jaeger tracing.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Service manifest for 'jaeger' exposing web, otlp grpc, and otlp http ports.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Deploy Jaeger all-in-one container for distributed tracing.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added Deployment for 'jaeger' using jaegertracing/all-in-one:1.36 image.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define PersistentVolume for PostgreSQL data on local host.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added PV 'postgres-pv-volume' pointing to /run/desktop/mnt/host/c/k8s-yas-data/postgres.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define PersistentVolume for pgAdmin data on local host.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added PV 'pgadmin-pv-volume' pointing to /run/desktop/mnt/host/c/k8s-yas-data/pgadmin.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define PersistentVolumeClaim for PostgreSQL.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added PVC 'postgres-pv-claim' requesting 1Gi with local-storage class.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define PersistentVolumeClaim for pgAdmin.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added PVC 'pgadmin-pv-claim' requesting 1Gi with local-storage class.

yaslocal.yaml.general_idea: Define StorageClass for local persistent volumes.
yaslocal.yaml.human_impl: Added StorageClass 'local-storage' with no-provisioner and WaitForFirstConsumer binding.
